title: Equipment Management
subtitle: Register, modify, and manage calibration records

list.title: Equipment List
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or management number
list.emptyDescription: Register equipment to start managing calibration schedules, checkout history, and non-conformances.
list.noSearchResultsDesc: No results found for "{term}". Try a different search term or adjust filters.
list.noFilterResultsDesc: No equipment matches current filter criteria. Reset filters or change conditions.

search.inputAriaLabel: Search by name, model, or management number
search.placeholder: Search by name, model, or management number
search.hint: Press Enter to search or type to auto-search

basicInfo.title: Basic Information
basicInfo.siteDescriptionRestricted: You can only register equipment at your assigned site
basicInfo.siteDescription: Select the site where the equipment is located
basicInfo.classificationAutoSet: Automatically set when team is selected
basicInfo.classificationDescription: Classification code is determined by team selection
basicInfo.teamDescriptionRestricted: You can only register equipment for your assigned team
basicInfo.teamDescription: Classification code is auto-set when team is selected
basicInfo.specMatchDescription: Whether equipment specs match the specification

calibrationInfo.title: Calibration Information
calibrationInfo.lastDateDescription: Next calibration date is auto-calculated when entered with cycle
calibrationInfo.nextDateDescription: Auto-calculated based on cycle or manually entered
calibrationInfo.intermediateCheckDescription: Select if intermediate checks are needed between calibrations

statusLocation.title: Status & Location
statusLocation.description: Enter current status and location information
statusLocation.locationDescription: Enter the current location of the equipment
statusLocation.techManagerNoList: No technical managers found - enter manually
statusLocation.techManagerDescriptionWithTeam: Only technical managers from the selected team are shown
statusLocation.techManagerDescription: Select a team first to see available technical managers
statusLocation.manualLocationDescription: Enter the storage path for the manual file

test_engineer.label: Test Engineer
test_engineer.description: Approval from Technical Manager is required after submitting a create/edit request.

technical_manager.label: Technical Manager
technical_manager.description: Approval from Lab Manager is required after submitting a create/edit request.

system_admin.label: System Administrator
system_admin.description: Full system access for direct create/edit.

toasts.calibrationHistoryTempSaved: Temporarily added. Will be saved when the equipment is registered.

create.pageDescription: Register a new equipment in the system
create.approvalRequestDescription: Equipment registration request has been submitted. Please wait for Technical Manager's approval.
create.registrationDescription: New equipment has been registered successfully.
create.registrationWithHistory: New equipment registered. ({count} history records saved)
create.historyPartialDescription: Equipment registered but {count} history records failed to save.
create.registrationError: An error occurred while registering the equipment.
create.unknownError: An unknown error occurred while registering the equipment.

createShared.pageDescription: Temporarily register shared equipment from other teams or rental equipment.
createShared.guideCommon: Equipment temporarily borrowed from other teams (Safety, Battery, etc.)
createShared.guideCertRequired: Calibration must be valid during the usage period.
createShared.guideExpiry: Equipment will be deactivated when the usage period expires.
createShared.approvalRequestDescription: Temporary registration request has been submitted. Please wait for approval.
createShared.tempRegistrationDescription: Shared/rental equipment has been temporarily registered.
createShared.tempRegistrationWithHistory: Equipment temporarily registered. ({count} history records saved)
createShared.historyPartialSuccess: Equipment temporarily registered. {saved}/{total} history records saved.
createShared.historyPartialDescription: Equipment registered but {count} history records failed to save.
createShared.registrationError: An error occurred while registering the equipment.
createShared.unknownError: An unknown error occurred while registering the equipment.

temporary.title: Temporary Equipment Info
temporary.description: Enter temporary registration info for shared/rental equipment.
temporary.externalIdentifierCommonHelp: Enter the equipment ID used by the owning team.
temporary.externalIdentifierRentalHelp: Enter the equipment ID assigned by the rental company.

historyGuide.title: History Management Guide
historyGuide.description: You can pre-enter history information below. It will be saved together when equipment registration is completed.

confirmDialog.editDescription: Do you want to submit an update request for this equipment?
confirmDialog.createDescription: Do you want to submit a registration request for new equipment?
confirmDialog.approvalProcessStep1: Approval from Technical Manager is required after submitting the request.
confirmDialog.approvalProcessStep2: Equipment information will not be reflected until approved.
confirmDialog.approvalProcessStep3: Request status can be checked in notifications.

calibrationFactorsTab.title: Calibration Factors
calibrationFactorsTab.empty: Calibration factors feature is coming soon.

dialog.title: Register Calibration History
dialog.description: Enter calibration information. Technical manager approval is required after registration.
dialog.certificateFileRequired: Please attach the calibration certificate file

overdueBanner.title: Calibration Overdue
overdueBanner.description: This equipment's calibration is overdue. Please arrange calibration immediately or review non-conformance handling.

toasts.fileRequiredDesc: Please attach the calibration certificate file.
toasts.successDesc: Calibration history has been registered. Awaiting approval.
toasts.errorDesc: An error occurred while registering calibration history.

incidentHistoryTab.title: Incident History
incidentHistoryTab.sectionDescription: Equipment damage, malfunction, change, and repair records.

dialog.title: Register Incident
dialog.descriptionRepair: Enter repair history in detail. Non-conformance link is required.
dialog.descriptionDefault: Enter damage, malfunction, change, repair, or other incidents.
dialog.typeSelectHint: Selecting an incident type shows the appropriate form. Selecting "Repair" shows a detailed repair form with required non-conformance linking.

repair.ncDescription: Repair history must be linked to a non-conformance. When repair is completed, the non-conformance status is automatically updated.

calibrationOverdue.autoNcDescription: Calibration overdue is automatically registered as non-conformance.
calibrationOverdue.noDuplicateNote: If NC already exists, no duplicate will be created.
calibrationOverdue.pastIncidentNote: NC record will be created, but current equipment status will not change.

nonConformance.ncWillBeCreated: A non-conformance record will be created.
nonConformance.workflowStep2: Write repair record and link NC on repair history page
nonConformance.workflowStep3: When repair is complete, NC automatically changes to "Action Completed"
nonConformance.workflowStep4: Technical manager approves NC closure → Equipment status restored
nonConformance.actionPlanPlaceholderOverdue: e.g. External calibration scheduled (2024-02-15), internal review pending, etc.
nonConformance.actionPlanPlaceholderDefault: e.g. External repair scheduled, parts replacement needed, etc.

toasts.successDesc: Incident history has been registered successfully.
toasts.errorDesc: An error occurred while registering incident history.
toasts.repairErrorDesc: An error occurred while registering repair history.

dialog.title: Register Location Change
dialog.description: Enter location change information for the equipment.
dialog.newLocationPlaceholder: e.g. RF1 Room, 2F Test Lab, etc.

toasts.successDesc: Location history has been registered successfully.
toasts.errorDesc: An error occurred while registering location history.
toasts.deleteErrorDesc: An error occurred while deleting location history.

dialog.title: Add Maintenance Record
dialog.contentPlaceholder: e.g. Routine inspection, parts replacement, cleaning, etc.

toasts.successDesc: Maintenance record has been registered successfully.
toasts.errorDesc: An error occurred while registering maintenance.
toasts.deleteErrorDesc: An error occurred while deleting maintenance record.

checkoutHistoryTab.title: Checkout History
checkoutHistoryTab.notAvailable: Equipment is not available for checkout

dialog.title: Request Checkout
dialog.description: Enter checkout information. Checkout is available after approval.
dialog.restrictedWarning: Due to current status ({status}), checkout is only available for calibration/repair purposes.
dialog.rentalDisabled: External Rental (not available in current status)

toasts.successDesc: Checkout request has been submitted. Awaiting approval.
toasts.errorDesc: An error occurred while submitting checkout request.
toasts.rentalNotAllowedDesc: Non-conforming or overdue equipment cannot be rented externally. Checkout is only available for calibration or repair.

repairHistory.emptyDescription: No repair history for this equipment.
repairHistory.title: Repair History
repairHistory.timelineDescription: View repair history in chronological order
repairHistory.formNcDescription: Selecting a damage/malfunction NC will automatically update its status to "Corrected" when repair is completed.
repairHistory.formNcReadonlyDescription: Non-conformance link cannot be changed during editing.
repairHistory.formAutoLinkInfo: Auto-link: Setting repair result to "Repair Completed" will automatically change the NC status to "Corrected".
repairHistory.validationDescriptionMin: Repair description must be at least 10 characters
repairHistory.createDescription: Register a new repair history entry.
repairHistory.deleteDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this repair history? Deleted records cannot be recovered.
repairHistory.toastCreateError: An error occurred while registering repair history.
repairHistory.toastUpdateError: An error occurred while updating repair history.
repairHistory.toastDeleteError: An error occurred while deleting repair history.

nonConformanceManagement.title: Non-Conformance Management
nonConformanceManagement.repairNeededDesc: {type} type requires repair record before closing non-conformance.
nonConformanceManagement.repairLinkedApproval: Repair record linked - ready for closure approval

form.ncTypeHint: Damage/Malfunction types require a repair record.

confirm.repairRequired:
Damage/Malfunction types require a repair record link.

Navigate to repair history page?

equipmentImport.equipmentInfoDesc: Enter basic information about the equipment to import.
equipmentImport.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter additional description about the equipment.
equipmentImport.ownerDepartmentInfoDesc: Enter information about the department that owns the equipment.
equipmentImport.usagePeriodAndReasonDesc: Enter the usage period and import reason.
equipmentImport.detailedReasonPlaceholder: Enter detailed background and reason for import.

toasts.vendorRequired: Please enter the rental vendor name.

createForm.rentalSubtitle: Import rental equipment from an external vendor.
createForm.internalSubtitle: Temporarily import shared equipment from another department.

nonConformanceBanner.title: Non-Conforming ({count} issues)
nonConformanceBanner.description: This equipment is currently non-conforming. Checkout and rental are restricted until non-conformance is resolved.
nonConformanceBanner.statusWarningDesc: This equipment has exceeded its calibration deadline or is non-conforming. Usage is restricted and a non-conformance record will be automatically generated.

calibrationHistorySection.title: Calibration History
calibrationHistorySection.description: Calibration history for this equipment. View details on the calibration management page.
calibrationHistorySection.dialogDescription: Enter calibration history information for the equipment.
calibrationHistorySection.formNextCalDateHint: Auto-calculated based on calibration date and cycle.
calibrationHistorySection.validationCycle: Please enter a valid calibration cycle.
calibrationHistorySection.validationNextCalDate: Please enter the next calibration date.
calibrationHistorySection.validationNextCalDateOrder: Next calibration date must be after the calibration date.
calibrationHistorySection.saveError: An error occurred while saving calibration history.
calibrationHistorySection.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this calibration history? This action cannot be undone.

calibrationFactorsClient.title: Calibration Factor Management
calibrationFactorsClient.requestDialogDescription: Register a new calibration factor. It will be applied after technical manager approval.
calibrationFactorsClient.toastSuccessDesc: Calibration factor change request has been submitted. Please wait for technical manager approval.
calibrationFactorsClient.toastErrorDesc: An error occurred while submitting calibration factor change request.
calibrationFactorsClient.toastRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
calibrationFactorsClient.toastInvalidJson: Invalid parameter format. Please enter valid JSON.
calibrationFactorsClient.pendingDescription: Calibration factor change requests awaiting technical manager approval
calibrationFactorsClient.currentDescription: Approved and currently active calibration factors ({count} total)

sharedBanner.title: Shared Equipment Notice
sharedBanner.temporaryDesc: This is a temporarily registered {source, select, safety_lab {shared} other {rental}} equipment.
sharedBanner.expiryNotice: It will be automatically deactivated when the usage period ends.
sharedBanner.sharedDesc: This equipment is registered as shared. Editing and checkout are available, but deletion is not.

editToast.requestDescription: Equipment edit request has been submitted. Please wait for technical manager approval.
editToast.successDescription: Equipment information has been updated successfully.
editToast.errorDescription: An error occurred while editing equipment.
editToast.unknownError: An unknown error occurred while editing equipment.

attachmentSection.editDescription: Attach a history card when editing existing equipment
attachmentSection.createDescription: Attach an inspection report when registering new equipment
attachmentSection.guideFormats: Supported formats: PDF, Images (JPG, PNG), Documents (DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX)
attachmentSection.guideDragDrop: You can easily upload by dragging and dropping files

location.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this location history?

maintenance.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this maintenance record?
maintenance.contentPlaceholder: e.g., Quarterly inspection - normal operation confirmed

incident.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this incident record?
incident.contentPlaceholder: e.g., Power supply damage requiring board replacement

dialog.title: Software Change Request
dialog.description: Enter the software change details and verification record. Verification record is required.
dialog.verificationPlaceholder: Describe the verification performed after the change (e.g. Compared with previous measurement results, confirmed difference within 0.1dB)

toast.createSuccessDesc: The software change request has been submitted. Please wait for the technical manager's approval.
toast.createErrorFallback: An error occurred while submitting the software change request.

conditionCheck.title: Condition Check
conditionCheck.description: Inspect the condition of the received equipment. Equipment will be automatically registered upon confirmation.

notFound.title: Equipment not found
notFound.description:
The requested equipment does not exist or has been deleted.
Please check the equipment ID.
notFound.helpDescription: Search from the equipment list or look up by management number.
